description:
India Book (IB) IV,41 (ח55). Letter from Yiṣḥaq b. Avraham Ibn ʿEzra, in Spain, to Ḥalfon b. Netanel ha-Levi. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: after 1 Nisan 1139 CE.

The zimām numerals on the verso are doubtful. MAF suggests 1, 60, 100, 400, 40, 1, 100, 1, ?, 8, 8. What he identifies as 1s (𐋡) look more like 4s (𐋤). The one he marks as 60 (𐋯) is doubtful. The one he marks as doubtful might be 900 (𐋻). (PG)
description_he: ספר הודו IV,41. מכתב מיצחק בן אברהם אבן עזרא, ספרד, לחלפון בן נתנאל הלוי; ביהודית-ערבית; לאחר 1 ניסן 1139 לספירה
